items.title: [正面] Amazing story and art, I didn't expect they'd go t...
items.summary:
Amazing story and art, I didn't expect they'd go that far but considering it is love craftian... I should've expected there would be not much hahas (which is great). I love how the PVP is fair and addicting, probably the only game with PVP as a side feature that I enjoy. The devs are EXTRA generous with rewards and gacha.

The only cons is they don't have actual translators so the game uses machine translation. It'd be great if they hire proper translator in the future for the sake of understanding story and mechanics.

Edit: The newest update is translation update! I hope the devs can slowly improve every text in the game, esp for the main story. Let's us keep playing and continue supporting this amazing hidden gem!

items.title: [正面] Hermoso, si jugaron 'Slay the Spire' es eso pero c...
items.summary:
Hermoso, si jugaron 'Slay the Spire' es eso pero con personajes con temática Lovecraft (Y gacha obviamente). La historia esta muy buena, los diseños son hermosos. 
Ojo si que las traducciones son automáticas con AI y en español o ingles a veces es medio cualquier cosa lo que dicen en los últimos capítulos, pero es un equipo chico y están trabajando en mejorar eso.
